# Public Assets Directory

This folder contains static assets that will be served at the root of your website.

## Instructions

**Place your `logo.png` file directly in this `/public` folder.**

Once you add `/public/logo.png`, it will be accessible at:
- `https://your-domain.com/logo.png`

## Current Usage

The following files reference `/logo.png`:
- Navigation component
- Home page footer
- Login page
- ForgotPassword page

Make sure your logo file is named exactly: `logo.png`
